content.query:
SELECT TOP 1000
Days
,AbsenceStartDate
,AbsenceEndDate
,CalendarDays
,DATEDIFF(dd, AbsenceStartDate, AbsenceEndDate)
,CASE WHEN AbsenceType = 'Sickness' THEN DATEDIFF(dd, AbsenceStartDate, AbsenceEndDate)
ELSE NULL
END AS SicknessLength
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_absence_dim]

SELECT
CASE 
    WHEN AbsenceType = 'Sickness' THEN 'Sickness'
    WHEN AbsenceType LIKE '%Annual%' THEN 'Annual'
    ELSE 'Other'
END AS AbsenceGroup
,sum(cast(ab.Days as FLOAT)) d1
,sum(cast(ab.CalendarDays as FLOAT)) d2
--,AbsenceEndDate
--cast(ab.CalendarDays as FLOAT) d2
--CalendarDays
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_absence_dim] ab
--Order by CalendarDays DESC
WHERE AbsenceEndDate >= '2022-12-01T00:00:00.0000000'
AND AbsenceEndDate <= '2022-12-31T00:00:00.0000000'
GRoup by AbsenceType 

SELECT DISTINCT WorkScheduleID
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_absence_dim]

SELECT DISTINCT WorkScheduleRule
FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_work_schedule_dim]


SELECT DISTINCT IsActive FROM [odw_harmonised_db].[dbo].[hr_absence_dim]
